content: [Better UI: General UI Tweaks] Fixed NaN egg count
[Better UI: Better Inventory] Optimized to decrease item load times
[Better UI: Better Inventory] Fixed CC items not theming properly
[Better UI: Better Inventory] Fixed latest clan/league stamps not being themed
[Theme Manager] Fixed bug with themes not applying on startup
[Custom Crosshair] You can now rotate the standard crosshair! :o
[Custom Crosshair] You can now scale the standard & dot crosshairs
